auditTitle: Log — where did the outreach come from?
auditIntro: Each line shows the entry path (API-key webhook or Zenith), receipt date, known context and status. Phone partially masked here; full detail (e.g. IP) in the GDPR export (Settings → Download my data).
auditRetention: Queue identifiers are anonymised or erased within 120 days (aggregated stats may be kept). A new WhatsApp outreach for the same number is not sent until 120 days after the previous campaign started; after that, a new send is possible unless the user opted out (STOP).
